title: aehelpers-more
description: Ported ae2helpers to 1.20.1, enhanced and expanded its functionality.
body:
![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1468017/description_75ff9af6-e2a8-4afe-889d-d6f7b377f214.gif)

This mod is a port of [ae2helpers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ae2helpers) to Minecraft 1.20.1, with enhanced and expanded functionality, and more updates to come in the future.

**Features:**

*   **Crafting Result Import Card**  
    A specialized upgrade for the Pattern Provider.  
    **Function:** Allows the Pattern Provider to extract items, fluids, etc., from specific faces of a block.  
    **Usage:** Right-click to open the configuration interface and set the extraction side. Note that some machines may not output from certain faces or require specific configurations (e.g., furnaces only output from the bottom, so the card must be configured to Down).
*   **Automatic Recipe Insertion**  
    An improved Crafting Terminal workflow.  
    **Function:** When you request an autocrafting recipe in the terminal, the grid enters a "waiting" state, and the slot renders a ghost item. Once the CPU completes the crafting process, the item is automatically inserted into the grid. No more waiting to click on the recipe!  
    **Usage:** Click on the left side of the terminal to toggle this feature on or off. It's a global setting—enabling it in one interface will also enable it in others.  
    **Enhancement:** Now, if you open the CPU interface after requesting a recipe and then return, the "waiting" state will not reset (closing the interface will reset it).

**Compatibility**  
This mod is compatible with several other mods, so you can use it with confidence.

**More:**

*   If you find any bugs, feel free to submit an issue.
*   If you have any good ideas, feel free to leave a comment in the comments section.
